svg.title: Predictive labor scheduling module architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer pipeline: data collection from POS and weather APIs, forecasting engine using weighted day-of-week model, and shift suggester outputting a Telegram recommendation with HITL confirmation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the POS hourly data collector work — what tables does it write to?')
sendPrompt('Which weather API works best for Vilnius and how do I get a free key?')
sendPrompt('Explain the weighted day-of-week regression model — how many weeks of history do I need before it is accurate?')
sendPrompt('How does the shift suggester convert an hourly revenue forecast into a concrete roster suggestion?')
sendPrompt('What does the Telegram shift suggestion message look like, and what HITL actions does the owner have?')
sendPrompt('What new SQLite tables does the scheduling module need?')
sendPrompt('How does an approved shift suggestion write back to barista_shifts.csv?')
